text.title: uv as the Python Lockfile Floor Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Project keeps both `uv.lock` and `poetry.lock`. CI uses one, devs use the other; environments drift.
antipattern.fix: Delete the legacy lockfile in the same PR that adds uv.lock.

antipattern.symptom: Agent prompt says `Run pytest`. Agent picks system Python, missing test deps.
antipattern.fix: Add the `uv run` snippet to AGENTS.md; reject prompts containing bare `pytest`.

antipattern.symptom: `requires-python = '>=3.10'`. CI on 3.13, dev on 3.10. Subtle behaviour diffs ship.
antipattern.root-cause: No upper bound on Python version.
antipattern.fix: Pin to a single minor version range (`>=3.12,<3.13`).
